params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the Weapon component class - 'type' (required), 'max_projectiles' (optional).

max_projectiles.title: Max Projectiles
max_projectiles.description: Maximum number of simultaneous projectiles this weapon can have in flight. Default is 1.
max_projectiles.markdownDescription: Maximum number of simultaneous projectiles this weapon can have in flight. Default is `1`.
